mapper.select: SELECT id, submitted_by, original_filename, total_records, created_at, status, reviewed_at, reviewed_by, rejected_reason FROM pending_batch_imports WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, submitted_by, original_filename, total_records, created_at, status, reviewed_at, reviewed_by, rejected_reason FROM pending_batch_imports ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, submitted_by, original_filename, total_records, created_at, status, reviewed_at, reviewed_by, rejected_reason FROM pending_batch_imports WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT id, submitted_by, original_filename, total_records, created_at, status, reviewed_at, reviewed_by, rejected_reason FROM pending_batch_imports WHERE submitted_by = #{submittedBy} ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pending_batch_imports (id, submitted_by, original_filename, total_records, created_at, status) VALUES (#{id}, #{submittedBy}, #{originalFilename}, #{totalRecords}, #{createdAt}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, batch_id, username, gender, college, grade, student_no, phone, duration, activity_name, original_activity_name, user_exists FROM pending_batch_import_records WHERE batch_id = #{batchId} ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pending_batch_import_records (batch_id, username, gender, college, grade, student_no, phone, duration, activity_name, original_activity_name, user_exists) VALUES (#{batchId}, #{username}, #{gender}, #{college}, #{grade}, #{studentNo}, #{phone}, #{duration}, #{activityName}, #{originalActivityName}, #{userExists})

INSERT INTO pending_batch_import_records (batch_id, username, gender, college, grade, student_no, phone, duration, activity_name, original_activity_name, user_exists) VALUES
(#{r.batchId}, #{r.username}, #{r.gender}, #{r.college}, #{r.grade}, #{r.studentNo}, #{r.phone}, #{r.duration}, #{r.activityName}, #{r.originalActivityName}, #{r.userExists})
